mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT * FROM users WHERE phone = #{phone} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET password = #{password} , updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE users SET deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP , withdraw_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP , refresh_token = NULL WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
